stemHtml: What must an applicant for an aerobatic rating have completed?

options.a: At least 5 hours of aerobatic instruction and 30 hours of flight time as PIC in aeroplanes or TMGs.
options.b: At least 5 hours of aerobatic instruction and 25 hours of flight time as PIC in aeroplanes or TMGs.
options.c: At least 10 hours of aerobatic instruction and 30 hours of flight time as PIC in aeroplanes or TMGs.
options.d: At least 5 hours of aerobatic instruction and 20 hours of flight time as PIC in aeroplanes or TMGs.
